content_of_post_to_answer: Why is mindset more important than talent for long-term success?
answer: Talent creates an advantage, but mindset determines what happens when that advantage stops being enough. Most long-term success is built in the boring middle: recovering from failure, staying curious, accepting feedback, and continuing when progress feels invisible. I've explored this pattern in more detail on my profile for anyone who wants to go deeper. Talent may open the first door, but mindset decides whether someone keeps walking when the path gets difficult.
